findings.title: Pre-pass artifact missing at expected report path
findings.detail: Expected file skills/reports/bmad-agent-content-creator/quality-scan/2026-03-26_231429/structure-capabilities-prepass.json was not present in the workspace. Deterministic pre-pass findings could not be merged verbatim; structural validation was performed manually against SKILL.md and references.
findings.action: Regenerate or copy structure-capabilities-prepass.json into the quality-scan run directory so future scans can preserve verbatim pre-pass output.

findings.title: Frontmatter name, kebab-case id, and Use-when description present
findings.detail: name is bmad-agent-content-creator; description states role and includes explicit Use when triggers with quoted phrases (talk to Irene, Instructional Architect, content design, Marcus delegation).

findings.title: Identity section is actionable and aligned with capabilities
findings.detail: One-sentence persona expands into concrete behaviors: Bloom, cognitive load, backward design, delegation to Paige/Sophia/Caravaggio, no prose writing, Marcus envelope context. Matches Capabilities and Does Not Do.

findings.title: Communication style uses concrete exemplar bullets
findings.detail: Multiple quoted or clearly framed example utterances tie style to instructional design (delegation precision, pedagogical feedback, downstream annotations). Aligns with medical-education domain and orchestrator workflow.

findings.title: Principles are domain-specific decision frameworks
findings.detail: Ten principles operationalize learning science (objective traceability, cognitive load, Bloom mapping, backward design, style-bible grounding) rather than generic platitudes.

findings.title: Internal capability routes resolve to existing reference files
findings.detail: All Internal Capabilities table paths (pedagogical-framework.md, delegation-protocol.md, template-assessment-brief.md, save-memory.md) exist under references/. No orphaned capability file references detected in manual check.

findings.title: Memory path consistent across activation and memory-system
findings.detail: SKILL.md uses {project-root}/_bmad/memory/content-creator-sidecar/index.md as single entry; references/memory-system.md uses the same sidecar root. Save Memory (SM) capability points to save-memory.md; memory-system documents save triggers and write-through behavior.

findings.title: Headless delegation block defines envelope validation and workflow
findings.detail: On Activation includes Headless subsection: parse envelope, validate required fields, read style bible, follow delegation-protocol, assemble templates, return to Marcus. Matches declared sidecar/orchestrator pattern.

findings.title: Trigger phrase 'content design' is broad
findings.detail: The description invites activation on generic 'content design' needs, which may overlap with other BMad agents unless the platform ranks by specificity. More distinctive phrases (instructional architect, Irene, Bloom-level design) are also present and help disambiguation.
findings.action: Optionally narrow the trigger clause to emphasize instructional-architecture and delegated-writer workflows, or document intended priority vs. other content skills.

findings.title: Project-relative paths assume course repo layout not bundled in skill folder
findings.detail: Overview and activation reference resources/style-bible/, state/config/course_context.yaml, and course-content/staging/. These are not present under skills/bmad-agent-content-creator/; init.md expects them in the deployment project. This is coherent for a sidecar course project but creates a structural dependency for first-run success.
findings.action: Ensure deployment docs or Marcus onboarding state that these directories/files must exist (or are created by another pipeline) before Irene runs; consider a one-line pointer in Overview if this skill is copied standalone.

metadata.template_artifacts_in_skillmd: none observed ({project-root} and config placeholders only)

summary.assessment: Structure is complete with required sections, no invalid exit sections, and strong identity, principles, and communication guidance. Capability table files exist; memory and headless flows are documented. Main gap is the missing pre-pass JSON for deterministic replay; secondary gap is reliance on project-relative paths (style-bible, course_context) outside the skill package.
